objective: Small compile-preserving lib refactor focused on shared-code reuse/contracts: keep existing root topology (app/core/features/router/shared/testing/theme plus root entrypoints), and replace duplicated presentation/json policy with existing shared/core contracts instead of broad package moves.

Reused navivoxOptionalStringFromJson in ReconnectReadiness blocked recovery messages.
Reused compactProfileHealthLabel in servers overview presentation, removing cross-feature dependency on ProfileContactPresentation for compact health policy.
Reused navivoxOptionalStringFromJson for pairing handoff target IDs and setup QR failure detail normalization; removed local _nonEmpty duplicate and covered trimmed target matching.
Removed setup QR import _asNonEmptyString wrapper and called navivoxOptionalLiteralStringFromJson directly at endpoint normalization seams.
Added shared profileContactIdentityLabel and reused it for profile avatar identity fallback; covered display/profile/server/fallback ordering.
Reused navivoxOptionalStringFromJson for app install identity normalization.
Reused navivoxOptionalStringFromJson for gateway connection token/websocket request normalization.
Reused navivox JSON helpers directly in GatewayNavivoxChannel message scope, tool artifact, profile contact, voice capability parsing; removed pass-through local parser wrappers.
Reused navivoxOptionalStringFromJson for saved-session baseUrl normalization.
